TestQ2: The slope of −1.1 means that for each increase of 1 unit in murder rate, the model predicts that the average family income decreases by 1.1 thousand dollars (or $1,100).
TestQ3: The slope of 1.18 for temperature means that for each increase of 1 degree in temperature, the model predicts the response variable will increase by 1.18 units, on average.
